blockers: Backend tenant config support is required before real clinics can manage nav, section visibility, or feature flags.
Feature flags currently default to true for backwards compatibility. Confirm this business rule before onboarding tiered plans.
Dynamic WordPress HTML is sanitized client-side with DOMPurify, but rich embeds may need an allowlist decision later.

tasks.title: before_after CPT + gallery section: native CPT mirroring useDoctors() with BeforeAfterSection gallery, filter by treatment_type, featured-pin + display_order sort, feature-flagged behind beforeAfterGallery (R3).

Testimonial video + source fields: extend testimonials CPT with video_url, video_thumbnail, source_platform, treatment_received (ACF-only). Inline HTML5 player when video_url present; source/treatment metadata text otherwise.

Tenant-scoped LocalBusiness + Review schema: extend jsonLd.ts with LocalBusiness->Dentist, Review, AggregateRating generators. Wire into SocialProofSection (LocalBusiness) and TestimonialsSection (Review + AggregateRating). All tenant-data-driven, zero hardcoding (R1), self-hiding (R8).

Location-aware appointment requests + non-PHI intake handoff: extend ContactForm with optional location_id / preferred_time / reason_for_visit fields and a new contact-lease REST endpoint. Zero PHI (R4); mock submit path logs + resolves.
special_offer CPT + offer band section: native CPT mirroring useTestimonials() with SpecialOffersSection band, client-side active-window + is_active filter, feature-flagged behind specialOffers (R3).

Service pricing fields + before/after slider: extend services CPT with pricing fields (starting_price, price_range_max, price_suffix, is_price_upon_request, price_fine_print, financing_note, procedure_time, recovery_time, gallery, icon_override — ACF-only). Per-service pricing band in ServicesSection hidden behind servicePricing flag (R3) and suppressed when is_price_upon_request (R2). New accessible BeforeAfterSlider (role=slider, ARIA vals, keyboard + touch, prefers-reduced-motion, tenant CSS vars only).

Doctor credentials repeater + drawer: extend doctors CPT with credentials repeater (credential_title, credential_type, institution, year), years_in_practice, languages_spoken, personal_bio_video_url, fun_fact (ACF-only). Mapper normalises legacy qualifications[] and new credentials[] into one chip list. Credential chip subset + details drawer in DoctorsSection, gated behind teamCredentials flag (R3). Drawer self-hides with zero credentials (R2).
financing_option CPT + financing band: native CPT with FinancingSection band, is_in_house_plan drives distinct styling, feature-flagged behind financing (R3).
location CPT + amenity chips + office-tour gallery: native CPT with multi-location support, amenity tags, office photos, field behind locationAmenities flag (R3).
case_study CPT + smile-stories band: native CPT mirroring useDoctors() with CaseStudiesSection band, feature-flagged behind caseStudies (R3).

NexHealth-style sandboxed scheduling embed: SchedulingSection rendering a sandboxed iframe pointed at the tenant scheduling-embed URL (schedulingUrl from tenant config, zero hardcoding R1/R8). Feature-flagged behind scheduling (R3, defaults OFF). Self-hides when no URL configured (R2). iframe sandboxed allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-forms — top-navigation denied (R6). Skeleton placeholder while loading. No PHI into analytics (R4).

Analytics blueprint (GTM + GA4 + Meta CAPI + CallRail DNI): tenant-config-driven AnalyticsConfig type, consent-gated analytics abstraction layer (NO-OP before consent + PHI-route exclusion), server-side CAPI proxy, IP anonymization + PII scrubbing (R5), mock placeholder IDs, bootstrap wiring in App.tsx after tenant config resolves.

BAA registry + PHI-flow gate + audit logging: per-tenant BaaRegistry context reading baa_registry from tenant config, useBaaGate hook gating PHI-adjacent reads/writes (R4) and script/embed loading (R6), audit log on every PHI-adjacent access, mock registry with one cleared and one blocked vendor.

Multi-channel mobile sticky CTA bar: tenant-configurable tabs (Phone/SMS/Email/Callback) with inline expandable forms, feature-flagged behind stickyCta (R3), self-hides when no channels configured (R2).
Full CMP cookie consent: granular reject/accept controls, branded via tenant CSS vars, blocks trackers pre-consent.
Commit and review feat/testimonials-collection; wire a dedicated TestimonialsPage if a full-list route is desired.
Update the WordPress tenant config endpoint to return sections, navigation, and features.
Verify GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=...&_embed=true against a real tenant and confirm the resolved base URL/path contract.
Verify the new GET /wp-json/wp/v2/testimonials?_embed=true CPT is registered on the backend and returns title, content, and the rating/location ACF fields.
Decide whether nested WordPress page paths should resolve by final slug only or full path hierarchy.
Replace placeholder production API values in .env.production before deployment.

High-conversion landing sections: FAQ accordion (SEO JSON-LD), Social Proof trust bar (Organization JSON-LD), Insurance & Payment options. All tenant-data-driven, self-hiding, behind feature flags, zero hardcoding.

WCAG 2.1 AA compliance pass: skip link, route focus reset, mobile-menu focus trap + Escape, global :focus-visible ring, fallback alt text for operator-edited images, <address> for contact metadata, ul/li grid structures, sr-only live region announcements. Zero hardcoding.

Dynamic Accessibility Suite: tenant-scoped AccessibilitySuiteContext provider (localStorage-persisted prefs), floating <AccessibilityPanel /> dock with text scale, contrast mode, dyslexic font, text spacing, audio-help live region, virtual pointer target-sizing, and keyboard-map cheat sheet. Visual overlays applied to <html> via CSS classes. Zero hardcoded colors/URLs — all branding via useTenantColors() + CSS variables.

completedLog.summary: Added root .editorconfig and .gitattributes to standardize on UTF-8, LF line endings, and 2-space indentation. Normalized vite.config.ts.
Implemented domain-based tenant resolution, sessionStorage caching, and runtime CSS custom properties mapped to Tailwind variables.
Centralized WordPress REST fetching via React Query hooks. Built visitor-facing pages, SEO layout frames, and skeletal loading states.
Added frontend contract validations for tenant sections, features, and navigation arrays. Hooked catch-all routing inside DynamicPage with client-side DOMPurify scrubbing.
Constructed full 8-layer Testimonials stack matching Doctors/Services. Developed TestimonialsSection centering on dark premium layout canvas featuring an asymmetric 3-card stagger pattern.

updates: Audited existing TenantContext, router, sections, and hooks against all four architecture principles.
Built the full Testimonials 8-layer stack mirroring Doctors/Services exactly.
Designed TestimonialsSection as a dark editorial canvas with an asymmetric 3-card stagger.
Fixed build errors in flight and verified npm run build passes on feat/testimonials-collection.

decisions.decision: R3 resolved via option (a): useFeatureFlag/useSectionVisible accept per-call { defaultValue: false }. Legacy flags keep true-default (backwards-compat). Every new Phase-4 flag MUST pass defaultValue:false so it stays off until a tenant opts in.
decisions.rationale: Closes PRE-1 in phase4-tasks.json; external Ruflo memory_store no longer available so the record lives in-repo.

decisions.decision: location CPT coexists with clinic-info. clinic-info remains the single source of truth for single-location tenants. location CPT is additive for multi-location tenants only. MapSection/ContactSection read from clinic-info for single-location, and render one card per location for multi-location tenants. Single-location tenants are unaffected.
